overview: Imports text units from an input document into a [Pensieve TM](https://okapiframework.org/wiki/index.php/Pensieve_TM). Each text unit is imported into the specified TM; if the text unit is segmented, each segment is imported individually. Text units without text for the specified target locale are skipped.

tmDirectory.help:
Full path to the directory containing the Pensieve TM. If the TM does not exist at this path, a **new TM is created**. If the TM already exists, entries are **added** to the existing ones.

Supports the `${rootDir}` variable for constructing relative paths.
tmDirectory.values: Absolute directory path. Supports the `${rootDir}` variable.
examples: `${rootDir}/my-tm` — TM directory relative to the project root
`/data/shared-tm` — absolute path to a shared TM

overwriteSameSource.help:
Controls how duplicate source texts are handled during import. When enabled, if an entry being imported has the same source text as one or more existing TM entries, **all matching existing entries are replaced** by the new one.

Leave disabled if you want to allow **multiple different translations** for the same source text in the TM.
notes: **Warning:** When enabled, this replaces *all* matching entries — if the TM contains multiple translations for the same source, they will all be removed and replaced by the single new entry.

processingNotes: If a text unit is segmented and the number of segments differs between source and target, the **whole text unit** is imported instead of individual segments.
Text units that do not have text for the specified target locale are **skipped** (not imported).
If the target TM directory does not exist, it is automatically created.

examples.title: Import into a new or existing TM
examples.description: Configure the step to import text units into a Pensieve TM located relative to the project root, adding to any existing entries without overwriting duplicates.

examples.title: Import with duplicate overwrite
examples.description: Replace existing TM entries when the source text matches, ensuring only the latest translation is kept for each source.
